title: Daily Brief — Friday, May 29, 2026
content:

## 📊 Strategy (MSTR) — Bitcoin Treasury

**Current Price:** ~$154.20 ▼ -3.6%

- 🏦 **BTC Holdings:** 818,334 BTC — Q1 alone saw 89,599 BTC acquired at ~$80,929 avg
- 🛒 **Latest Buy:** Additional 24,869 BTC purchased in May 2026
- 🎯 **Analyst Consensus:** Strong Buy (12 of 15 analysts) | **12-Month Target: $380.79 (+147%)**
- 📉 **Context:** Stock pulled back as Bitcoin stalls near $73–80K range; seen as a buying opportunity by bulls
- 💡 **BTC Yield YTD:** 9.4%, funded by $7.37B in equity/preferred offerings in Q1

## ₿ Bitcoin

**Current Price:** ~$73,460 ▼ -2.6% (May 28)

- 📉 **Price trend:** Down from $82,320 on May 6 — driven by PCE inflation hitting 3.8% (highest since 2023) and geopolitical risk
- 🕊️ **U.S.–Iran:** 60-day ceasefire memorandum extended — partial positive for risk assets
- 📊 **Fear & Greed Index:** Currently in **Fear** territory (briefly touched Neutral on May 6, first since Jan 17, then slipped back)
- 💰 **Institutional Flows:** CoinShares reported $857.9M inflows in one week — BTC led, ETH/SOL/XRP also participated
- 🎯 **Price Outlook:** Models project ~4.5% gain to ~$80,500 by end of May

**Weekly Sentiment Trend:**

```
Jan–Apr: ████████ Extreme Fear → Fear
May 6:   ░░░░░░░░ Neutral (first since Jan 17) ↑
May 16:  ████████ Fear (BTC slips to ~$78K)   ↓
May 29:  ████████ Fear (~$73K)                ↓
```

---

## 🤖 Tech & AI

- 🚀 **Anthropic reaches $965B valuation** — raised $65B in latest round as Claude demand surges *(Washington Post)*
- 🧠 **Claude Opus 4.8 launched** — new "effort control" and "dynamic workflows" for complex coding; $5/1M input tokens *(StartupHub.ai)*
- 💻 **Code with Claude London event** (May 19–20) — most Anthropic software now written by Claude; Claude Code adoption accelerating *(MIT Technology Review)*
- 🔒 **Project Glasswing** — Anthropic gives AWS, Apple, Cisco, Google, JPMorgan, Microsoft early access to unreleased Claude Mythos Preview for security vulnerability hunting
- 📈 **Anthropic overtakes OpenAI** in enterprise market share — quadrupled business customers since May 2025

---

## 🔬 Health & Science

- 🧠 **Neuron regeneration breakthrough:** Japanese scientists develop vitamin K-based compounds that may help brains regenerate lost neurons — potential Alzheimer's/Parkinson's treatment *(ScienceDaily)*
- 🧬 **Parkinson's spread mechanism:** GPNMB protein identified as key driver in how Parkinson's disease propagates through the brain
- 👁️ **No-laser vision correction:** Platinum contact lenses + mild electrical pulses being developed as incision-free LASIK alternative
- 🥦 **Diet & blood pressure:** Beans, lentils, chickpeas, soy could reduce high blood pressure risk by up to 30% *(LiveScience)*
- 🤖 **2026 health trend:** AI + genetics + personalized medicine converging to transform how diseases are detected and prevented

---

## 💰 Finance & Markets

**S&P 500:** 7,563.63 ▲ +0.58%  |  **Nasdaq 100:** New record highs ▲ +0.5%

- 📊 S&P 500 hit all-time high on Apr 30 (7,209); now at 7,563 — Big Tech leading the rally
- 🏦 **Fed:** Paused at 3.50–3.75%; 10-Year Treasury yield at 4.40%; higher-for-longer narrative intact
- 📈 **PCE Inflation:** Rose to 3.8% in April — highest since 2023; rate-cut hopes pushed further out
- 🕊️ **Iran ceasefire:** 60-day memorandum easing oil market tensions; market relief rally in play
- ☁️ **Microsoft +3.4%:** Morgan Stanley cloud upgrade and reports of new AI coding model launch *(Motley Fool)*

*Brief generated by Claude · May 29, 2026 | Sources: Yahoo Finance, CoinDesk, Washington Post, MIT Technology Review, AccuWeather, ScienceDaily, Motley Fool, Bankless Times*
